name: Legal Brief
description: Formal legal-document styling with clear hierarchy and disciplined spacing.

preview.sampleText: Structured legal layout with formal rhythm and high readability.

classes.h1: text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-center text-gray-900 tracking-wide
classes.h2: text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 text-gray-900 border-b border-gray-300 pb-2 uppercase
classes.h5: text-sm font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-xs font-semibold mt-3 mb-2 text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.th: border border-gray-300 p-2 bg-gray-100 text-left font-semibold text-gray-900
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-gray-400 pl-5 my-6 italic text-gray-700 bg-gray-50 py-3
classes.code: bg-gray-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-gray-800
classes.pre: bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-gray-300
